events.fact: Grandpa Bud adds a second cooking spit to the fire to increase food production efficiency.
A storage chest is placed in a secondary building to manage inventory overflow.
The player discovers a boar Runestone while traveling.
The player destroys an abandoned structure and collects a Queen Bee.
A two-star boar is encountered and killed.
A second Queen Bee is obtained after dismantling another building with a workbench.
The player successfully performs a parry and stagger on a Greydwarf using a wood shield.
The player officially enters the Black Forest biome for the first time, triggering a visit from Hugin.
The player's health drops to 9 HP due to neglected food buffs while exploring.
A temporary camp is established in an abandoned house.
A roof is constructed over an outdoor campfire to protect it from rain.
A bed is placed in the temporary shelter to set a new spawn point.
The player sleeps in the temporary bed to end the day.
